title: Protect local financial data
description: Ledger stores, backups, temporary candidates, evidence metadata, attribution, logs, diagnostics, and non-data-return output preserve the sole-owner local trust boundary without custom cryptography; explicit requested data results remain permitted.
target: 100% of created financial artifacts have owner-only host access; zero diagnostics, logs, process arguments, or non-data-return outputs contain credentials, raw provider or document payloads, mailbox or messaging content, unmasked account or instrument identifiers, transaction descriptions, or serialized financial payloads; the selected maintained at-rest protection passes OQ-LEDGER-8 before planning.
load_condition: Normal operation, errors, evidence and reconciliation workflows, backup, restore, storage evolution, External Orchestrator invocation, and optional skill invocation on each supported host.
measurement: Permission inspection, forbidden-field contract scans, secret and payload canary scans, negative-path tests, artifact inspection, and the required storage security spike.
rationale: Evidence and payment attribution expand sensitive local state but do not change the accepted owner-only, provider-neutral boundary. Supports G1, G5, G8, G9, and G11.
